message:
feat(approval): implement allow-once approval tokens with audit trail

Add approval token system for RequireApproval policy decisions:

approval.rs:
- ApprovalScope: workspace and action-scoped approval context
- ApprovalStore: store and validate allow-once approvals
- Token generation with configurable code length
- Action fingerprinting for replay protection
- TTL-based expiration

storage.rs:
- ApprovalTokenRecord: persistent token storage
- AuditActionRecord: audit trail for approved actions
- FTS indexes for approval lookup
- Token validation queries
- Audit log queries with time range filtering

policy.rs:
- Wire approval checking into policy evaluation
- Add ApprovalRequest for interactive approval flow

Tokens are workspace-scoped and action-fingerprinted to prevent
replay of approvals across different contexts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
